title: Grappa (Hutt)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Carmesi5u.jpg]] |name=Grappa |homeworld=[[Genon]]{{FactFile|132|HUT 11-12|Grappa the Hutt}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=1.75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]]-and-purple |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Grappa, you've got it all wrong!''"
"''Wrong? So I'm incompetent as well as ineffectual, is that it? Well, let me assure you that you will find my associates, the Zanibar, extremely competent ''and'' effective.|[[Tarrant Snil]] and Grappa, before the former was taken by the Zanibar|[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]]}} '''Grappa''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] criminal who lived on [[Genon]]. At one point, he owned the starship ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' and employed the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]].[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 2: ''Crimson Empire'']] He kidnapped [[Feena D'Asta]] and had her replaced with a [[Feena D'Asta (clone)|clone]]. Throughout all of his dealings with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Grappa's ultimate goal was [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] domination. ==Criminal life and empire== ===A new bounty hunter=== [[File:Grappaseat.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Grappa tries to watch his new "[[Kir Kanos|bounty hunter]]" from a hidden camera.]] In his palace on [[Genon]], Grappa racketeered and profited from illegal business. He would throw underlings who failed him into a cage with a monster and watch them die. He employed various [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. One such group at his disposal was [[Sol Mon]]'s pirate group, who hijacked and stole various ships' values and riches for Grappa. The group included a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-loathing [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guard named [[Tront]], who frequently caused Grappa to get his [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]], [[4/NG]], fixed by his "techs". When an unknown bounty hunter, [[Kir Kanos|Kenix Kil]], arrived at Grappa's docking bay, Grappa had him feathered in a room prepared for his arrival. Grappa had cameras installed in the room to find out Kil's true identity; however, Kil found one and jammed the other, which only angered Grappa more. ===Deals with the Empire=== [[File:Grappamacus.jpg|thumb|200px|Grappa meets with [[Macus Kayniph]].]] Grappa met with [[Macus Kayniph]] during his reign. He gave Macus [[gree spice]] for [[Feena D'Asta]], a [[Feena D'Asta (clone)|clone]] of whom was made to decoy the fiendish plot. They drank to their deal. Little did Grappa know that his new court member, [[Mirith Sinn]], heard the entire plot. After his deal with Macus, Grappa sent his new prisoner, [[Tarrant Snil]], with his associates, the [[Zanibar]], and started a party for the success of Kil. The party ended too soon when Grappa received an unwanted communication from "the faceless one". Macus came to visit Grappa and another party ensued. During the party, Mirith Sinn went to free Feena. On her way out, Grappa stopped her in her tracks and introduced her to an old acquaintance, [[Massimo]]. Knowing that they both had knowledge of his hijackings, he sent them with the Zanibar. When one of the Zanibar could not find Kil, Grappa took his gun and shot him. Macus interfered, and Grappa, in a fit of rage, shot him in the chest and killed him. That was a mistake, for [[Y'ull Acib]] ordered that nothing happen to Macus, for if it did, it would go on Grappa's head. To explain his death to Acib, Grappa had all of his court killed in an "accidental" ship explosion. It failed to enthuse Acib. When the Zanibar brought in [[Kir Kanos]], Grappa recognized him as Kil himself. When Acib told him to make sure nothing happened to Macus before his arrival, Grappa was ready to make a run for it. ===His last mistake=== [[File:Grappa.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Grappa the Hutt under arrest.]] When a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] strike force [[Attack on Grappa the Hutt's fortress|raided]] his palace, Grappa was surprised to see that Mirith Sinn escaped the Zanibar. Sinn forced Grappa into one of his own cells, where he remained until he was released by [[Schmood]], a court member who did not go on Grappa's ill-fated ship. In return, Grappa pushed Schmood into the cell and locked it because Schmood did not help him when he was put into the cell in the first place. While getting ready to set sail for [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to catch up with Sol Mon, Grappa was confronted by the Zanibar. When he refused to pay the price they agreed on for bringing in Kir Kanos, they chained him up to be used in their next "ceremony". ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Zee Ethda, you disappoint. My first promise to you was that of a ''painful death'' should you fail to capture Tarrant Snil for me. I ''always'' keep my promises... in the order that I give them.|Grappa, to [[Zee Ethda]]|[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]]}} Grappa was callous, sadistic, and ruthless to the extreme. He had no tolerance for incompetence or disloyalty, and would frequently execute those who had failed him, usually by giving them to the Zanibar for use in their rituals. He was easily angered, and prone to acting irrationally when faced with any form of challenge or disagreement, as shown when he murdered Macus Kayniph, not caring that doing so would destroy his relationship with the Black Sun. ==Behind the scenes== On the cover of [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]], Grappa was erroneously depicted as having orange eyes, similar to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]], despite having blue eyes in the comic itself. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Grappa}} *''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]]
